languages.text: {n}Орудие с оглушительным ревом дергается, пытаясь достать до вас — и тут же обессиленно падает на землю. Вам кажется, что недобрый огонь в глазах машины заметно меркнет, словно сковавшие ее цепи высосали из орудия колдовские силы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Орудие с оглушительным ревом дергается, пытаясь достать до вас — и тут же обессиленно падает на землю. Вам кажется, что недобрый огонь в глазах машины заметно меркнет, словно сковавшие ее цепи высосали из орудия колдовские силы.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The machine emits a deafening roar and jerks, trying to reach you — but then quickly collapses limply to the ground. The hostile fire in its eyes seems to dim, as though the chains binding it have sapped the engine's sorcerous power.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Орудие с оглушительным ревом дергается, пытаясь достать до вас — и тут же обессиленно падает на землю. Вам кажется, что недобрый огонь в глазах машины заметно меркнет, словно сковавшие ее цепи высосали из орудия колдовские силы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The machine emits a deafening roar and twitches, trying to reach you — but quickly collapses, devoid of power. You feel the unkind fire in its eyes has dimmed, as if the chains binding it sapped sorcerous power from the engine.{/n}

{n}The machine emits a deafening roar and twitches, trying to reach you — but quickly collapses, devoid of power. You feel the unkind fire in its eyes has dimmed, as if the chains binding it sapped sorcerous power from the engine.{/n}

{n}The machine emits a deafening roar and jerks, trying to reach you — but then quickly collapses limply to the ground. The hostile fire in its eyes seems to dim, as though the chains binding it have sapped the engine's sorcerous power.{/n}

{n}The machine emits a deafening roar and jerks, trying to reach you — but then quickly collapses limply to the ground. The hostile fire in its eyes seems to dim, as though the chains binding it have sapped the engine's sorcerous power.{/n}

{n}The machine emits a deafening roar and jerks, trying to reach you — but then quickly collapses limply to the ground. The hostile fire in its eyes seems to dim, as though the chains binding it have sapped the engine's sorcerous power.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Maschine stößt ein ohrenbetäubendes Gebrüll aus und versucht ruckartig, dich zu erreichen — doch dann bricht sie schnell und schlaff auf dem Boden zusammen. Das feindliche Feuer in ihren Augen scheint zu erlöschen, als hätten die Ketten, die sie fesseln, die magische Kraft der Maschine geschwächt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The machine emits a deafening roar and jerks, trying to reach you — but then quickly collapses limply to the ground. The hostile fire in its eyes seems to dim, as though the chains binding it have sapped the engine's sorcerous power.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Maschine stößt ein ohrenbetäubendes Gebrüll aus und versucht ruckartig, dich zu erreichen — doch dann bricht sie schnell und schlaff auf dem Boden zusammen. Das feindliche Feuer in ihren Augen scheint zu erlöschen, als hätten die Ketten, die sie fesseln, die magische Kraft der Maschine geschwächt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La machine émet un rugissement assourdissant et tressaille, essayant de vous atteindre — mais elle s'effondre rapidement sur le sol. Le feu hostile de ses yeux semble s'éteindre, comme si les chaînes qui la lient avaient épuisé le pouvoir sorcier du moteur.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The machine emits a deafening roar and jerks, trying to reach you — but then quickly collapses limply to the ground. The hostile fire in its eyes seems to dim, as though the chains binding it have sapped the engine's sorcerous power.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La machine émet un rugissement assourdissant et tressaille, essayant de vous atteindre — mais elle s'effondre rapidement sur le sol. Le feu hostile de ses yeux semble s'éteindre, comme si les chaînes qui la lient avaient épuisé le pouvoir sorcier du moteur.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La máquina emite un rugido ensordecedor y se sacude, tratando de alcanzarte, pero enseguida se desploma sin fuerzas sobre el suelo. El fuego hostil de sus ojos parece apagarse, como si las cadenas que la atan hubieran minado el poder hechicero del motor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The machine emits a deafening roar and jerks, trying to reach you — but then quickly collapses limply to the ground. The hostile fire in its eyes seems to dim, as though the chains binding it have sapped the engine's sorcerous power.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La máquina emite un rugido ensordecedor y se sacude, tratando de alcanzarte, pero enseguida se desploma sin fuerzas sobre el suelo. El fuego hostil de sus ojos parece apagarse, como si las cadenas que la atan hubieran minado el poder hechicero del motor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Makine sağır edici bir kükreme çıkarıyor ve size ulaşmaya çalışarak sarsılıyor — ama sonra hızla yere yığılıyor. Gözlerindeki düşmanca ateş sönmüş gibi görünüyor, sanki onu bağlayan zincirler motorun büyülü gücünü tüketmiş gibi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The machine emits a deafening roar and jerks, trying to reach you — but then quickly collapses limply to the ground. The hostile fire in its eyes seems to dim, as though the chains binding it have sapped the engine's sorcerous power.{/n}
